TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_tongan, title = tongan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/tongan} }

S.FORM: alang tongan ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 278 buwan, 952 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 88% kyan ku 841 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 12% kyan ku 111 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Setik 71%, Tayan 9%, Amis 2%, Bunun 3%, Paywan 1%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na tongan hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na tongan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na tongan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na tongan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na tongan hya' ga pulan. tay 'llaw na tongan hya' ga snuwing. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang tongan ga niya mki sku Nanto Keng atu Nin'ay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 278 buwan, 952 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 88% kyan ku 841 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 12% kyan ku 111 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Setik 71%, Tayan 9%, Amis 2%, Bunun 3%, Paywan 1%, Truku 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na tongan hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na tongan hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na tongan hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na tongan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na tongan hya' ga pulan. tay 'llaw na tongan hya' ga snuwing. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ toŋan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku nanto keŋ atu ninʔaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, s~ɕetik **%, tajan *%, amis~ɕ *%, βunun *%, pajwan *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na toŋan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na toŋan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na toŋan ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na toŋan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na toŋan ħjaʔ ɣa pulan. taj ʔllaw na toŋan ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕnuwiŋ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
